name: Green Hydrogen Production Cost
description: Cost of producing hydrogen via electrolysis powered by renewable energy. Key enabler for industrial decarbonization, long-duration storage, and synthetic fuels.

data_points.source: IRENA Green Hydrogen Cost Reduction report 2020 (historical estimate for PEM electrolysis + early solar)
IEA The Future of Hydrogen 2019 — estimated green H2 cost with declining solar prices
IRENA Green Hydrogen Cost Reduction — electrolyzer + renewable electricity costs declining
IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2021 — best case regions approaching $4-5/kg
IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2022 — best regions Chile, Middle East, Australia
IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023 — projects in Saudi Arabia, Chile targeting $3-4/kg
IRENA World Energy Transitions Outlook 2024 — best projects approaching $3/kg (approx)
